data.name: Emily The Exhibitionist
data.detailed_description:
Emily The Exhibitionist is an ENF and exhibitionism themed game made up of 4 short games:

Emily The Exhibitionist

Emily is a University student with a habit for snitching on other students. After Su steals her clothes to teach her a lesson, Emily now needs to make the right choices in order to get home without being seen.

Emily The Exhibitionist Part 2

Emily is stuck in a time loop, repeatedly waking up in a broken down elevator...naked. Once again, she'll need to make the right choices to save her pride and, this time, the University. Helped by Willow, Su and a mysterious streaker.

Alice Returns

After getting lost driving through the woods in a storm, Nova rushes to a nearby house in the middle of nowhere where she meets two sisters, Alice and Ashley. Alice seems irritable and is clearly not happy about Nova's presence whereas Ashley just wants to have fun with her. Meanwhile, something spooky is lurking in the woods.

Strip Blackjack

Ai-Chan The Student - After accidentally walking in on Ai-Chan naked, she now wants revenge and blackmails you into playing Strip Blackjack. Just try not to get caught...

Harmony The Nudist - While walking through a seemingly empty beach, you're approached by a very naked Harmony, a friend from the University. Realizing it's a nude beach, you get uncomfortable as she tries to help you relax. Later that day, Harmony meets you in private and challenges you to Strip Blackjack to help you get comfortable with seeing her naked. After all, she just wants a nudist friend

Nova The Magician - Nova is having some anxiety about performing on stage and she picks you, a random student, out from the hallway to keep her company and help her practice her magic before she has to perform. She wants to play Strip Blackjack and show off her tricks to help take her mind off things, anything but put her magician's outfit on

Features

  • Voice Acting for all characters

  • Music and sound effects throughout

  • Over 1,500 3D Rendered Images and 4 animations

  • Female Protagonist

Main Characters

Auris Valara as Emily

MerryBella as Su

Honey Vee as Ashley

Auris Valara as Willow

Yenny DC as Tina

Auris Valara as Raven

Trina Deuhart as Ai-Chan

DollVa as Nova

Aeon as Harmony

RM as Alice

Minor Characters

Trina Deuhart as Terri

PrippyTeaVA as Police Woman

Ivettexo as Emily’s Mum

Vega B as Luke

Ivettexo as Layla

PrippyTeaVA as Emerald

PrippyTeaVA as Tenma 1.0

Cameos(Very Minor Characters)

PrippyTeaVA as Miku

RM as Itsuki

PrippyTeaVA as P. Summers

Honey Vee as Ada

Vega B as Sam

Dollva as Beth

PrippyTeaVA as Minori

PrippyTeaVA as Miku’s Friend

Vega B as Aaron

Ivettexo as Sarah

•••••••••••• Music By •••••••••••••

"In a Pensive Mood''

''Indian Hop"

"With Loved Ones"

"Indie"

"Peace and People"

Jay Man - OurMusicBox

Sound effects obtained from zapsplat

data.short_description: Emily is a University student with a habit for snitching on other students. After Su steals her clothes to teach her a lesson, Emily now needs to make the right choices in order to get home without being seen. Also includes Strip Blackjack
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
